baseline.notes: Run #26: goal 4/4 (kickoff rescue worked) but gate over-fired: 10 goal FPs, shot_on_target TP 17->12. Reasoning-validated + clustered kickoff filter.

notes: Run #27 — Tighten kickoff-inference gate: reasoning must contain strong kickoff markers (center spot, both teams in own halves, kickoff setup/formation) AND >=2 validated kickoffs must cluster within 30s. Run 26 over-fired because isolated VLM kickoff tags (often midfield free kicks) triggered shot->goal promotions. Expected: preserve 4/4 goal (1065s kickoff pair at 1078/1088 clusters), cut goal FPs from 10 to ~3-4, recover shot_on_target TPs.
